description: Azusa 13 is a Mexican American street gang based in Azusa, California, founded in the 1960s. It is one of the most aggressive Sureño gangs, with around 400 active members. The gang is affiliated with the Mexican Mafia and engages in drug trafficking, extortion, and hate crimes, including a campaign of ethnic cleansing against African Americans. Many members have been indicted and convicted since 2011 for terrorizing African American residents.
